items.name: pawsome pizza
items.description: For every purchase of a pawsome pizza, The Mash donates $1 to local animal shelter AARCS. Crust: Rolled oats Spent grain Honey vegetable oil peanut butter ​Toppings: Pumpkin puree Chicken Roasted red pepper Mozzarella cheese *Not intended for meal replacement, please feed as a treat only, suggested serving size 1/4 pizza per 25lb.
